# The Butler Realty

> Brian Butler, REALTOR® (eXp Realty, License #SA701819000) serves home buyers and sellers in San Tan Valley and Florence, Arizona.

Brian Butler is a licensed Arizona real estate agent with eXp Realty, specializing in residential real estate in San Tan Valley and Florence, Arizona. Four years of experience serving buyers and sellers in these markets.

## Pages
- [Home](https://thebutlerrealty.com/): Overview of Brian Butler's real estate services for San Tan Valley and Florence buyers and sellers.
- [About](https://thebutlerrealty.com/about): Brian Butler's background, license, and approach to real estate.
- [Buyers](https://thebutlerrealty.com/buyers): Guidance and resources for first-time buyers and relocators purchasing in San Tan Valley and Florence.
- [Sellers](https://thebutlerrealty.com/sellers): Pricing strategy, marketing, and the listing process for sellers in San Tan Valley and Florence.
- [Areas](https://thebutlerrealty.com/areas): Local market knowledge of the San Tan Valley and Florence communities Brian serves.
- [Resources](https://thebutlerrealty.com/resources): Free downloadable guides — buyer checklists, seller guides, market reports, and a home maintenance calendar.
- [Reviews](https://thebutlerrealty.com/reviews): Client testimonials and reviews of Brian Butler's work as a REALTOR®.
- [Contact](https://thebutlerrealty.com/contact): Contact information and inquiry form to reach Brian Butler.
- [Home Value](https://thebutlerrealty.com/home-value): Free home value report / Comparative Market Analysis request form.
- [Search](https://thebutlerrealty.com/search): Live MLS home search for Arizona listings.
- [San Tan Valley](https://thebutlerrealty.com/areas/san-tan-valley): San Tan Valley, Arizona neighborhood and market guide.
- [Florence](https://thebutlerrealty.com/areas/florence): Florence, Arizona neighborhood and market guide.
- [Community News](https://thebutlerrealty.com/community-news): Local news and community updates for San Tan Valley and Florence — city government, development, and HOA changes.
- [Community News: San Tan Valley](https://thebutlerrealty.com/community-news/san-tan-valley): Town government, incorporation, and development news for San Tan Valley.
- [San Tan Valley Incorporation](https://thebutlerrealty.com/community-news/san-tan-valley/san-tan-valley-incorporation): What San Tan Valley's new incorporation as an Arizona town means for its first budget, local control, and home costs.
- [Community News: Florence](https://thebutlerrealty.com/community-news/florence): Town government, development, and community events news for Florence.
- [Market Updates](https://thebutlerrealty.com/market-updates): Monthly real estate market data for San Tan Valley and Florence — listings, days on market, and price trends.
- [June 2026 Market Update](https://thebutlerrealty.com/market-updates/june-2026-san-tan-valley-florence): June 2026 market data for San Tan Valley and Florence — 332 sold listings, supply eases to 3.43 months.
- [May 2026 Market Update](https://thebutlerrealty.com/market-updates/may-2026-san-tan-valley-florence): May 2026 market data for San Tan Valley and Florence — 445 sold listings, supply tightens to 2.67 months.
